'''Tiron Til''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] gangster, owner of a criminal syndicate. At some point before [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Til contracted fugitive [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Zayl Braith]], which led to a good relationship between both of them. Later, Til decided to deal with [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] who aimed to monopolize the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] trade in the [[Asamin system/Legends|Asamin system]]. Braith, who was a native of Asamin, felt too much loyalty to Asamin to allow that. She was then expelled from the syndicate, and the negotiations continued.<ref name="AIR" />
